CREATE TABLE xenc_keys (key_name VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, key_value VARCHAR(255), key_type VARCHAR(50), fmt VARCHAR(50), key_passwd VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO xenc_keys (key_name, key_value, key_type, fmt, key_passwd) VALUES ('key1', 'value1', 'RSA', 'PEM', 'password1');
INSERT INTO xenc_keys (key_name, key_value, key_type, fmt, key_passwd) VALUES ('key2', 'value2', 'DSA', 'DER', 'password2');
INSERT INTO xenc_keys (key_name, key_value, key_type, fmt, key_passwd) VALUES ('key3', 'value3', 'EC', 'PEM', 'password3');
SELECT key_name FROM xenc_keys WHERE key_type = 'RSA';
SELECT key_name FROM xenc_keys WHERE key_value LIKE 'value%';
SELECT k1.key_name FROM xenc_keys k1 JOIN xenc_keys k2 ON k1.key_type = k2.key_type WHERE k1.key_name != k2.key_name;
SELECT key_name FROM xenc_keys WHERE key_name IN (SELECT key_name FROM xenc_keys WHERE key_passwd IS NOT NULL);
SELECT k.key_name FROM xenc_keys k WHERE k.key_name = (SELECT key_name FROM xenc_keys ORDER BY key_name LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE xenc_certificates (cert_name VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, cert_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO xenc_certificates (cert_name, cert_value) VALUES ('cert1', 'certificate_data1');
INSERT INTO xenc_certificates (cert_name, cert_value) VALUES ('cert2', 'certificate_data2');
INSERT INTO xenc_certificates (cert_name, cert_value) VALUES ('cert3', 'certificate_data3');
SELECT * FROM xenc_certificates WHERE cert_value LIKE 'certificate_data%';
SELECT a.cert_name FROM xenc_certificates a JOIN xenc_keys b ON a.cert_name = 'cert1' WHERE a.cert_name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT k.key_name FROM xenc_keys k LEFT JOIN xenc_certificates c ON k.key_name = c.cert_name WHERE c.cert_name IS NULL;
SELECT key_name FROM xenc_keys WHERE key_name NOT IN (SELECT cert_name FROM xenc_certificates);
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Not Valid' END AS validation FROM xenc_keys WHERE key_name = 'key1';
EXECUTE xenc_set_primary_key('key1');
EXECUTE xenc_set_primary_key((SELECT MIN(key_name) FROM xenc_keys));
